arguments.task: Open official Shopify developer documentation and pricing pages. Read live page content from canonical URLs that support: what Shopify is, Admin API and Storefront API surface, documented authentication methods for apps and APIs, rate limits, any official MCP/server documentation if it exists, and access/pricing or plan requirements for building against the API. Return the final canonical URLs visited and concise extracted findings with quotes or paraphrases grounded in the page text only. Do not use search result snippets or third-party sources.

input.thought: Start a browser task to inspect official Shopify pages and extract evidence-backed findings.

raw_result.description: Shopify is a commerce platform whose developer APIs let apps and storefronts manage store data and customer buying experiences.
raw_result.auth_notes: Browser-read Shopify developer docs indicated Admin API access uses a Shopify access token sent in the X-Shopify-Access-Token header, with OAuth used for public and custom apps; Storefront API docs indicated token-based access and tokenless access for unauthenticated storefront queries, but tokenless access is not a listed schema auth method here.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official Shopify developer documentation is publicly available and the public pricing page presents self-serve plans without contact-sales or approval gating for basic platform access.

api_surface.breadth: Official docs show multiple first-party GraphQL surfaces including the Admin GraphQL API and Storefront API, covering admin app integrations and storefront customer experiences.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official Shopify MCP/server documentation was verified from the gathered page reads.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Gathered docs indicated both Admin GraphQL API and Storefront API have documented rate limits; Admin GraphQL specifically has a rate-limits section on the official docs.
raw_result.notable_signals: Shopify maintains modern first-party developer documentation on shopify.dev with distinct API families and explicit auth header guidance.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Structured uncertainty remains for api_surface.type and mcp_exists because the gathered evidence in-chat referenced GraphQL surfaces but did not verify whether Shopify currently documents a REST surface on a page actually read here, and no explicit official MCP page was verified.

result.description: Shopify is a commerce platform whose developer APIs let apps and storefronts manage store data and customer buying experiences.
result.auth_notes: Browser-read Shopify developer docs indicated Admin API access uses a Shopify access token sent in the X-Shopify-Access-Token header, with OAuth used for public and custom apps; Storefront API docs indicated token-based access and tokenless access for unauthenticated storefront queries, but tokenless access is not a listed schema auth method here.
result.gating_reason: Official Shopify developer documentation is publicly available and the public pricing page presents self-serve plans without contact-sales or approval gating for basic platform access.

api_surface.breadth: Official docs show multiple first-party GraphQL surfaces including the Admin GraphQL API and Storefront API, covering admin app integrations and storefront customer experiences.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official Shopify MCP/server documentation was verified from the gathered page reads.

result.rate_limit_notes: Gathered docs indicated both Admin GraphQL API and Storefront API have documented rate limits; Admin GraphQL specifically has a rate-limits section on the official docs.
result.notable_signals: Shopify maintains modern first-party developer documentation on shopify.dev with distinct API families and explicit auth header guidance.
result.human_review_reason: Structured uncertainty remains for api_surface.type and mcp_exists because the gathered evidence in-chat referenced GraphQL surfaces but did not verify whether Shopify currently documents a REST surface on a page actually read here, and no explicit official MCP page was verified.
